# Aryan Rawther — AI & Web Consulting (Full Reference)

> This file follows the llmstxt.org standard. It is the expanded companion to /llms.txt and is intended to help AI systems accurately understand and represent Aryan Rawther and Apex Mind LLP in full detail.

---

## Who is Aryan Rawther?

Aryan Rawther is the Founder and Principal Consultant of Apex Mind LLP, based in Bengaluru, India. He is a specialist in AI automation, AI integration & agentic workflows, technical SEO, GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation), web development, and SaaS development.

He works with businesses across India and globally — including SaaS companies, startups, EdTech platforms, insurance firms, and e-commerce businesses — to design and deliver AI-powered systems, high-performance web products, and organic growth strategies.

With 20+ client projects delivered across India and globally, and 5 years of hands-on experience, Aryan specialises in taking complex technical challenges and turning them into measurable business outcomes. He operates on a 100% milestone-based delivery model — transparent, predictable, and fair pricing. He has served clients in 3+ countries.

---

## Company

- **Company name:** Apex Mind LLP
- **Website:** https://aryanrawther.com
- **Location:** Bengaluru, India
- **Service area:** India and global (remote)
- **Contact:** contact.aryanrawther@gmail.com
- **Founder:** Aryan Rawther
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/aryanrawther

---

## About Aryan Rawther

### Background & Story

Aryan's career spans five distinct environments over five years:

1. **Growthspree (Digital Growth Agency)** — Learned frontend development, SEO, and marketing through referral work during his second year of university.
2. **PESU Venture Labs** — Full-stack lead, building products, designing architecture, and mentoring teams.
3. **UpTrain (Y Combinator startup)** — Built the entire product dashboard; worked across marketing, design, and executive teams.
4. **Egnyte (Enterprise)** — Enterprise-grade systems for large clients, experience with scale and compliance.
5. **CombineHealth (Healthcare AI)** — Worked across infrastructure, frontend, backend, AI systems, growth, SEO, and marketing. Focused on eligibility automation and organic growth strategies.

After five years across agency, VC lab, YC startup, enterprise, and healthcare AI environments, Aryan founded Apex Mind LLP.

### Values

- **Outcomes over output** — Success is measured by results, not by lines of code or pages written.
- **Clarity at every step** — No surprises. Clients always know where the project stands, what's next, and why.
- **Built to last** — Everything is documented, tested, and maintainable by whoever comes after.
- **Honest about fit** — If a project isn't right, Aryan will say so and point to a better direction.

### The Team

Aryan works with a small team of specialists including designers, copywriters, and domain experts. Capabilities include AI Automation Consulting, Technical SEO, Web Development, SaaS Development, AI/ML Engineering, and Frontend Development.

### Key Stats

- **20+** client projects delivered
- **5** years of hands-on experience
- **100%** milestone-based delivery
- **3+** countries served

---

## Services (Detailed)

Aryan Rawther offers five consulting and development services. Every engagement starts with understanding the business — not pitching a solution.

### 1. AI Automation Consulting

**Page:** https://aryanrawther.com/services/ai-automation-consulting

You don't need to understand how AI works. You need to understand what it can do for your business. Aryan audits operations, identifies where teams spend time on work that shouldn't require a human, and builds the automations that free them up.

**Deliverables:**
- Operations audit — mapping existing workflows to identify automation opportunities
- Automation strategy and roadmap — prioritised by time saved and implementation cost
- Document and email processing automation — invoices, forms, reports, inbound emails
- Customer communication automation — AI-assisted responses, routing, triage, follow-ups
- Data entry and extraction automation — pulling structured data from unstructured sources
- Internal reporting and summarisation — automated dashboards, weekly summaries, data digests
- Tool connection automation — linking CRMs, spreadsheets, email, calendars, and forms via AI
- No-code and low-code AI automation — n8n, Make (Integromat), Zapier + AI for fast deployment
- Ongoing monitoring and optimisation of deployed automations

**Process:**
1. Process audit — map current workflows, document where time is lost, and where AI adds the most ROI
2. Architecture design — design AI system architecture (agent structure, tool integrations, decision logic, data flow)
3. Build and integrate — build in milestones, connect AI to existing tools, test edge cases
4. Testing and handoff — full testing with real data, documentation, and recorded walkthrough

**Tech stack:** LangChain, CrewAI, n8n, OpenAI API, Anthropic API, Gemini API, Python, FastAPI, Webhooks, Google Drive API, Egnyte

---

### 2. AI Integration & Agentic Workflows

**Page:** https://aryanrawther.com/services/ai-integration-agentic-workflows

Most businesses already have the tools. What they're missing is intelligence between them. Aryan designs and builds AI systems that go beyond chatbots — autonomous agents that reason, retrieve, act, and integrate into the way a business actually operates.

**RAG & Knowledge Systems:**
- Custom RAG pipeline design and implementation
- Vector database setup — Pinecone, Weaviate, pgvector, Chroma
- Document ingestion pipelines — PDF, Notion, Google Drive, Confluence, web scraping
- Embedding model selection and optimisation (OpenAI, Cohere, open-source)
- Hybrid search — semantic + keyword for precision retrieval
- Internal knowledge bases, AI search systems, document Q&A products

**Workflow Automation & Agentic Systems:**
- AI agent design using LangChain, CrewAI, LangGraph, AutoGen
- Multi-agent orchestration — planner, executor, critic architectures
- Tool use and API integration — agents that take real actions in real systems
- Custom AI voice agents — Twilio, Deepgram, Whisper for customer service
- Human-in-the-loop workflows — approval gates, escalation logic
- n8n and low-code agent orchestration

**SaaS AI-ification:**
- AI feature audit — identifying where AI adds genuine value vs. noise
- Integration architecture design for existing codebases
- LLM API integration — OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, open-source models
- Prompt engineering and system prompt architecture
- AI reliability and safety — output validation, guardrails, fallback logic
- Cost and latency optimisation — model selection, caching, batching

**Multi-modal AI:**
- Whisper, GPT-4 Vision, Claude Vision, Gemini multi-modal integrations
- Document intelligence — invoice processing, contract analysis, form extraction
- Speech → reasoning → response pipelines for voice AI
- Real-time audio processing — speech-to-text, speaker diarisation, live transcription

**Process:**
1. Architecture & feasibility — define what's possible, design system architecture, choose models and frameworks
2. Data pipeline & infrastructure — document ingestion, chunking, embeddings, vector DBs, API integrations
3. Agent / RAG development — prompt engineering, multi-agent orchestration, tool calling, retrieval logic
4. Evaluation & production handoff — test retrieval, agent reasoning, latency; deliver documentation

**Tech stack:** LangChain, CrewAI, LangGraph, AutoGen, Pinecone, Weaviate, pgvector, Chroma, OpenAI API, Anthropic API, Gemini API, Twilio Voice API, Deepgram, OpenAI Whisper, Python, FastAPI, WebSockets, Redis, PostgreSQL, n8n

---

### 3. SEO Services

**Page:** https://aryanrawther.com/services/seo-services

Aryan helps businesses grow organic traffic through technical SEO, strategic content architecture, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation) — the practice of making content citable by AI systems like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. Not just rankings — genuine organic authority.

**Deliverables:**
- Technical SEO audit and remediation (Core Web Vitals, crawlability, indexing)
- On-page SEO — keyword research, content structure, internal linking architecture
- Content strategy and editorial planning for organic growth
- AI SEO / GEO — structured data, llms.txt, entity consistency for AI search visibility
- Programmatic SEO — scaled landing page strategies for high keyword coverage
- Link building strategy and outreach planning
- SEO for SaaS and tech products — product-led SEO, tool pages, comparison pages
- LinkedIn and platform content strategy for brand-driven SEO

**Process:**
1. Technical audit — full crawl: Core Web Vitals, indexability, duplicate content, internal links, schema markup
2. Keyword and content strategy — target keywords, competitive landscape, content gaps, editorial strategy
3. Implementation — direct implementation (Next.js/technical SEO) or implementation spec for the team
4. Monitoring and iteration — GSC and GA4 tracking, monthly reporting, iterative improvements

**Tech stack:** Ahrefs, Semrush, Screaming Frog, Google Search Console, Google Analytics 4, Next.js, JSON-LD Schema, Surfer SEO, Clearscope

---

### 4. Web Development

**Page:** https://aryanrawther.com/services/web-development

Aryan builds modern, production-grade web applications — from performant frontends with Next.js and React to robust Python backends with FastAPI. Every project is built with SEO, performance, and maintainability as first-class requirements, not afterthoughts.

**Deliverables:**
- Frontend development — React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, responsive design
- Backend development — Python (FastAPI, Flask), Node.js, REST API design
- Full-stack MERN applications (MongoDB, Express, React, Node)
- API architecture and design — RESTful, webhook integrations
- Third-party API integrations — payment gateways, Google APIs, enterprise tools
- Authentication systems — API key management, OAuth, JWT
- Database design — PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
- Deployment and DevOps — Vercel, Railway, Docker

**Process:**
1. Requirements and architecture — document requirements, propose architecture, get approval before coding
2. Milestone-based build — frontend, backend, integrations; each milestone delivered for review
3. Testing and QA — manual testing across browsers/devices, API testing, edge case coverage
4. Deployment and handoff — deployment, env setup, documentation, recorded walkthrough

**Tech stack:** Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, Python, FastAPI, Flask, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, REST APIs, Webhooks, WebSockets, Vercel, Railway, Docker, Git

---

### 5. SaaS Product Development

**Page:** https://aryanrawther.com/services/saas-development

Aryan helps founders and businesses build SaaS products — from the first line of architecture to a working, deployable product. This is a fundamentally different engagement from standard web development. It requires someone who thinks about the product as a business, not just a codebase.

**Deliverables:**
- MVP architecture and rapid prototyping — from idea to working product
- Multi-tenant SaaS architecture design — data isolation, tenant management, scalable infrastructure
- B2B product design — feature prioritisation, user flows, monetisation strategy
- API-first product architecture — usage tracking, rate limiting, API key systems
- Platform and marketplace architecture — vendor/buyer flows, listing systems
- SaaS pricing and monetisation strategy consulting
- Technical product roadmap development
- Procurement technology systems — RFP/RFI workflows, specification comparison, vendor evaluation

**Process:**
1. Product scoping — define MVP scope, what's in/out and why; resist scope creep
2. Architecture design — data model, multi-tenancy, API design, authentication, billing integration
3. Milestone build — backend first, then frontend, then integrations; each milestone tested and approved
4. Launch and roadmap — deployment, monitoring, documentation, post-launch support, post-MVP roadmap

**Tech stack:** Python, FastAPI, Node.js, React, Next.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Stripe, Redis, Docker, Railway, Vercel

---

## How I Work — Engagement Process

**Page:** https://aryanrawther.com/process

Every project is different — but the way Aryan runs them isn't. Here's the full process:

### Step 1: Before We Start
1. You reach out via contact form or WhatsApp.
2. Aryan reviews and responds within 24 hours.
3. 30-minute discovery call — free, no obligation. He listens more than he talks.
4. If there's a fit, a written proposal and SOW is delivered within 3–5 business days.

### Step 2: The Proposal & SOW
A typical SOW includes: scope definition, milestone breakdown, deliverable list, payment schedule tied to milestones, timeline estimate, and out-of-scope items listed explicitly. Billing is milestone-based — you pay when a milestone is delivered and approved, not upfront.

### Step 3: How We Communicate
- **Primary channel:** Slack or email — your choice
- **Status updates:** Weekly written update every Monday
- **Documentation:** Shared Notion workspace — kept up to date
- **Scope changes:** Written amendment before work starts

### Step 4: Milestone Delivery
1. Aryan completes the milestone deliverable.
2. Shares it for review.
3. You have agreed business days to request revisions or approve.
4. On approval, milestone payment is triggered and next milestone starts.
- Revision policy: typically 2 rounds per milestone, defined in the SOW.

### Step 5: Handoff & Documentation
At the end of every engagement, you receive: a post-launch support period (duration in SOW), clean codebase with comments, recorded walkthrough session, full technical documentation for the next developer, and a working tested deliverable.

### Step 6: What Makes This Different
- Problems are flagged early, before they become expensive.
- Documentation is part of the deliverable, not an afterthought.
- Aryan stays available after handoff.
- Scope changes are always handled in writing.

---

## Products

### SpecLens AI (Live)
- **URL:** https://speclens.ai
- **Page:** https://aryanrawther.com/products/speclens-ai
- **Description:** AI-powered procurement specification comparison platform for B2B buying decisions. Helps procurement teams compare vendor specifications side-by-side using AI analysis, manage RFP workflows, and evaluate vendors systematically.
- **Target users:** Operations managers handling RFP processes, B2B buyers evaluating products against requirements, procurement teams comparing vendor specifications.
- **Tech stack:** Next.js, Python, OpenAI, PostgreSQL, LangGraph, Gemini AI, Tailwind CSS

### PhotoshopRequest App (Beta)
- **URL:** https://www.photoshoprequest.app/
- **Description:** AI-powered photo editing platform inspired by r/photoshoprequest, featuring an automated editor-validator pipeline. Users submit photo editing requests, and an AI pipeline edits, validates, and delivers results using Gemini AI with PayPal payment integration.
- **Tech stack:** Next.js, TailwindCSS, Gemini AI, PayPal, LangGraph

### MediaMitra (Beta)
- **Page:** https://aryanrawther.com/products/mediamitra
- **Description:** AI-assisted media monitoring and content intelligence platform. Helps businesses monitor competitive landscape, track brand mentions, and analyse content.
- **Target users:** Businesses monitoring competitive landscape, content teams tracking brand mentions, PR teams and communications departments.
- **Tech stack:** React, FastAPI, OpenAI, PostgreSQL

### GEO Checker (Coming Soon — Open Source)
- **Page:** https://aryanrawther.com/products/geo-checker
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/Mr-Nayra/geo-checker
- **Description:** Check how well your website is optimised for AI search engines. Provides a GEO score, content analysis, and actionable recommendations.
- **Target users:** Web developers building AI-optimised sites, content marketers optimising for AI visibility, SEO professionals auditing GEO readiness.
- **Tech stack:** Next.js, TypeScript

## Case Studies (Detailed)

### 1. AI SEO Agent: Internal Linking & Backlink Graph
- **Industry:** Internal Tool / SEO
- **Services:** AI Integration & Agentic Workflows, SEO Services
- **URL:** https://aryanrawther.com/case-studies/seo-internal-linking-ai-agent
- **Challenge:** A 400+ page website needed internal linking structure and backlink quality audited and optimised — a process that previously took 20+ hours per week of manual work.
- **Solution:** Built a dual-agent LangGraph system using Firecrawl and Python to autonomously map, graph, and optimize internal linking structures and backlink quality.
- **Result:** Automated 400-page audits, saving 20 hours per week.

### 2. Autonomous Inbound Sales & Scheduling Agent
- **Industry:** HealthTech
- **Services:** AI Integration & Agentic Workflows, AI Automation Consulting
- **URL:** https://aryanrawther.com/case-studies/autonomous-inbound-email-agent
- **Challenge:** The C-suite was spending significant daily time manually reviewing inbound leads, researching companies, checking calendars, and drafting responses.
- **Solution:** Engineered an autonomous email agent using Gmail AI/PubSub, Perplexity, and OpenAI to research inbound leads, check calendars, and draft personalized replies instantly.
- **Result:** Automated 15+ daily inquiries and scheduling, eliminating manual work for the C-suite.

### 3. Healthcare Insurance Verification & RCM Automation
- **Industry:** Healthcare / RCM
- **Services:** AI Integration & Agentic Workflows, AI Automation Consulting
- **URL:** https://aryanrawther.com/case-studies/healthcare-rcm-automation
- **Challenge:** A US billing company required 7 full-time employees to manually verify insurance eligibility for 300 patients daily using eClinicalWorks.
- **Solution:** Built a custom AI-driven pipeline integrating with eClinicalWorks to automate insurance verification, removing the need for 7 FTEs.
- **Result:** Automated 300 patients per day, replaced 7 full-time employees.

### 4. SpecLens AI — Procurement SaaS
- **Industry:** B2B / Procurement
- **Services:** SaaS Product Development
- **URL:** https://aryanrawther.com/case-studies/speclens-ai-procurement-saas
- **Challenge:** Procurement teams needed a way to compare vendor specifications using AI, manage RFP workflows, and evaluate vendors systematically.
- **Solution:** Architected and built a full-stack procurement SaaS platform with AI-powered specification comparison, RFP workflows, and vendor evaluation.
- **Result:** MVP to live in 8 weeks.

### 5. AI-Powered Photo Editor Pipeline
- **Industry:** Consumer / AI SaaS
- **Services:** SaaS Product Development, AI Integration & Agentic Workflows
- **URL:** https://aryanrawther.com/case-studies/photoshoprequest-ai-editor
- **Challenge:** Creating a scalable photo editing platform that could automate the editing and quality validation process without human intervention.
- **Solution:** Built an AI-powered photo editing platform featuring an automated editor-validator pipeline using Gemini, Next.js, and PayPal integrations.
- **Result:** Fully automated editor and validator loop.

### 6. 1M Daily Impressions via Tech & AI SEO
- **Industry:** HealthTech / SaaS
- **Services:** Web Development, SEO Services
- **URL:** https://aryanrawther.com/case-studies/combinehealth-seo-redesign
- **Challenge:** CombineHealth needed a frontend rebuild from Figma designs with comprehensive technical and AI-SEO strategies to scale organic marketing.
- **Solution:** Rebuilt the CombineHealth frontend, implementing JSON Schema, llms.txt, 100% PageSpeed scores, and comprehensive technical SEO.
- **Result:** 1M+ daily impressions.

### 7. AI IVR Insurance Agent
- **Industry:** Insurance
- **Services:** AI Integration & Agentic Workflows
- **URL:** https://aryanrawther.com/case-studies/ai-ivr-insurance-agent
- **Challenge:** An insurance company needed an AI-powered interactive voice response system to handle inbound customer calls at scale.
- **Solution:** Built a production AI voice agent system using Twilio and Deepgram with speech-to-text, LLM reasoning, and text-to-speech pipelines.
- **Result:** Handles thousands of calls daily with high accuracy.

---

## Industries Served

### SaaS Companies
**Page:** https://aryanrawther.com/industries/saas
From AI feature integration to organic acquisition — Aryan works with SaaS teams that want to move fast without cutting corners. Common challenges addressed: AI feature pressure (choosing and building the right AI features), slow organic growth (over-reliance on paid acquisition), and technical debt (architecture outgrowing initial design). Services: AI Automation Consulting, SEO Services, SaaS Development.

### EdTech
**Page:** https://aryanrawther.com/industries/edtech
EdTech products need content delivery, personalisation, and scale. Aryan builds smarter learning systems. Common challenges: personalisation at scale, content discoverability (large libraries poorly indexed), and engagement/retention. Services: AI Automation Consulting, SEO Services, Web Development.

### Healthcare
**Page:** https://aryanrawther.com/industries/healthcare
Reduce administrative burden with AI, improve patient communication, and build compliant web properties. Common challenges: administrative overload (scheduling, documentation, coordination), patient communication gaps, and weak digital presence. Services: AI Integration & Agentic Workflows, AI Automation Consulting, SEO Services. Notable result: automated 300 patients/day and replaced 7 FTEs in healthcare RCM.

### E-commerce
**Page:** https://aryanrawther.com/industries/ecommerce
From AI product discovery to technical SEO — helping e-commerce businesses build scalable organic acquisition. Common challenges: paid acquisition dependency, poor product discoverability, and high customer service volume. Services: SEO Services, AI Automation Consulting, Web Development. Works with Shopify or custom Next.js storefronts.

### Startups
**Page:** https://aryanrawther.com/industries/startups
Execution partner for founders who need to move fast. Common challenges: building before validating, no technical co-founder, and early SEO neglect. Services: SaaS Development, AI Automation Consulting, SEO Services. Aryan works fee-based (not equity) and takes on pre-revenue startups on milestone-based engagements.

---

## Location & Availability

### Bengaluru (Bangalore)
**Page:** https://aryanrawther.com/location/bangalore
Based in Bengaluru — works with Bangalore startups, SaaS companies, and enterprises. Benefits: same timezone (IST), understanding of Bangalore's startup ecosystem (investors, hiring, product culture), available in-person for workshops, discovery sessions, and presentations.

### India-wide
**Page:** https://aryanrawther.com/location/india
Remote work with companies across Mumbai, Delhi, Hyderabad, Chennai, Pune. Benefits: India-fluent pricing (not dollar-based international rates), understanding of Indian B2B context (procurement, decision-making, constraints), available in IST.

### Remote / Global
**Page:** https://aryanrawther.com/location/remote
Fully async or hybrid work with global clients. Experience working with clients in UK, US, Middle East, and Southeast Asia. Benefits: milestone-based delivery (outcomes, not seat time), async-first communication (written updates, Loom, documentation), overlap hours for UK/EU mornings or US evenings.

## Blog Posts

### How to Rank on Google and Get Cited by AI Search Engines
- **Category:** SEO | **Read time:** 18 min
- **URL:** https://aryanrawther.com/blog/rank-on-google-get-cited-by-ai-search-engines
- A technical guide covering how to get cited by AI search engines (robots.txt, llms.txt, Google AI Overviews), a complete technical SEO checklist (sitemaps, meta tags, schema markup, page speed, internal linking, backlinks), common SEO mistakes, and real results showing AI referral traffic from ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Claude within 7 days of optimisation.

---

## Resources & Guides

### The Business Leader's Guide to AI Automation
- **Read time:** 12 min | **URL:** https://aryanrawther.com/resources/ai-automation-guide-for-business
- A practical, jargon-free guide to understanding what AI automation is, what it can do for your business, and how to evaluate whether it's worth investing in. Covers three levels of automation (simple task automation, AI-assisted workflows, fully autonomous agents), good candidates for automation, realistic ROI and timelines, and evaluating vendors.

### GEO Optimisation: How to Appear in AI-Generated Answers
- **Read time:** 15 min | **URL:** https://aryanrawther.com/resources/geo-optimisation-guide
- Making content visible in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. Covers how AI search engines choose what to cite, 6 GEO signals (authoritative entity definition, citation-ready formatting, structured data, llms.txt, content freshness, brand mentions), writing extractable content, and technical GEO implementation.

### Technical SEO Audit Checklist (2024)
- **Read time:** 10 min | **URL:** https://aryanrawther.com/resources/technical-seo-audit-checklist
- Step-by-step checklist for auditing technical health. Covers crawlability (robots.txt, XML sitemap, crawl budget, internal linking), Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, INP), indexability (canonical tags, noindex, pagination, duplicate content), structured data validation, and mobile usability.

### AI Voice Agents: What They Are and When to Use Them
- **Read time:** 8 min | **URL:** https://aryanrawther.com/resources/ai-voice-agents-explainer
- Explains what AI voice agents are, how they differ from traditional IVR, and specific use cases with ROI. Covers the tech pipeline (STT via Deepgram, LLM reasoning, TTS via ElevenLabs, telephony via Twilio), use cases (inbound call handling, claims intake, appointment booking, customer support), and implementation considerations.

### Next.js SaaS Architecture: A Practical Starting Point
- **Read time:** 18 min | **URL:** https://aryanrawther.com/resources/nextjs-saas-architecture
- Patterns and decisions for starting a new SaaS product with Next.js. Covers project structure, auth approaches (NextAuth vs Clerk vs custom JWT), multi-tenancy (subdomain routing, row-level security, tenant isolation), database design (Postgres with Prisma, PgBouncer), and deployment (Vercel, env vars, CI/CD).

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

### AI Automation
- **What is AI automation consulting?** — AI automation consulting involves analysing business processes and designing AI-powered systems that replace or augment manual work. This includes selecting the right AI models, designing agent workflows, integrating with existing tools, and ensuring the system is maintainable.
- **Which AI models does Aryan work with?** — OpenAI (GPT-4, GPT-4o), Anthropic (Claude), Google (Gemini), and open-source models. The right model is selected based on the task requirements, cost, and latency constraints.
- **Can you integrate AI into existing software?** — Yes. SaaS AI-ification is a core service — auditing where AI adds genuine value in an existing codebase, then integrating LLM APIs with proper prompt architecture, guardrails, and cost optimisation.

### AI Voice Agents
- **What is an AI voice agent?** — An AI-powered telephony system that handles inbound or outbound calls using speech-to-text (Deepgram/Whisper), LLM reasoning (OpenAI/Claude), and text-to-speech (ElevenLabs) — replacing or augmenting traditional IVR phone trees.
- **What happens when the AI can't handle a call?** — Human-in-the-loop escalation logic is built in. The agent detects when it's uncertain and transfers to a human agent with full context of the conversation so far.

### SEO Services
- **What is GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation)?** — GEO is the practice of structuring content so that AI systems — ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Claude — extract, understand, and cite it accurately. It involves answer-first writing, structured data, entity consistency, and an llms.txt file.
- **How long does SEO take to show results?** — Technical SEO fixes can show results in 4–8 weeks. Content and keyword strategies typically show meaningful organic growth in 3–6 months. GEO results — appearing in AI answers — can happen faster, as AI systems crawl and cite frequently.
- **Do you offer ongoing SEO retainers?** — Yes. After an initial audit and implementation phase, ongoing retainers cover monthly reporting, content strategy iteration, and technical SEO maintenance.

### Web Development
- **What tech stack does Aryan specialise in?** — The primary stack is Next.js + TypeScript for frontend and Python (FastAPI) for backend. Also works with the full MERN stack. The right stack is recommended based on the project, not a one-size-fits-all approach.
- **Do you handle deployment and hosting?** — Yes. Deployment to Vercel, Railway, or Docker-based environments is included. Env setup, CI/CD basics, and recorded walkthroughs are part of every handoff.
- **Can you work with an existing codebase?** — Yes. Many engagements involve extending or refactoring existing codebases rather than building from scratch.

### SaaS Development
- **What is multi-tenant SaaS architecture?** — A SaaS architecture where a single software instance serves multiple customers, with each customer's data kept isolated. Aryan designs these with row-level security, tenant management, and scalable infrastructure.
- **Can you act as a technical co-founder?** — Aryan works fee-based (not equity) but can fulfil the technical co-founder role — owning architecture, product decisions, and engineering execution for startups without a CTO.

### Working with Aryan
- **How much do your services cost?** — Pricing is milestone-based and depends on scope. A written proposal with a clear breakdown is provided before any work begins.
- **Do you sign NDAs?** — Yes. NDAs are signed before any discovery call where proprietary information will be discussed.
- **What's the first step to working together?** — Reach out via the contact form or WhatsApp. Aryan responds within 24 hours and schedules a free 30-minute discovery call.

### Apex Mind LLP
- **What is Apex Mind LLP?** — Apex Mind LLP is Aryan Rawther's registered consulting company, incorporated as a Limited Liability Partnership in India. It is the legal entity through which all client engagements are contracted.
- **Is Aryan Rawther a solo consultant or a team?** — Aryan is the principal consultant and handles all architecture, strategy, and core development. He works with a small team of specialists (designers, copywriters, domain experts) as needed per project.
- **Where is Apex Mind LLP based?** — Bengaluru, India. Serves clients across India and globally via remote engagement.

---

## Glossary of Terms

Aryan maintains a comprehensive glossary covering AI, SEO, and web development terminology at https://aryanrawther.com/glossary. Key terms organised by category:

### AI & Automation Terms
- **Agentic AI** — AI systems designed to plan, reason, use tools, and autonomously execute multi-step tasks — going far beyond single-turn question-and-answer interactions.
- **AI Agent** — A software system that can perceive its environment, make decisions, and take actions autonomously to achieve a goal.
- **AI Orchestration** — The coordination of multiple AI models, tools, memory systems, and agents to complete complex multi-step tasks — managed by frameworks like LangChain or CrewAI.
- **Chain-of-Thought Prompting** — A prompting technique where an LLM is guided to show its reasoning step-by-step before arriving at a final answer.
- **Context Window** — The maximum amount of text an LLM can process in a single interaction.
- **Embeddings** — Numerical representations of text that capture semantic meaning — the foundational technology behind semantic search, RAG, and AI similarity matching.
- **Fine-tuning** — Further training a pre-trained AI model on a domain-specific dataset to improve performance for a particular task.
- **Function Calling** — A capability that lets LLMs trigger predefined functions or external APIs — enabling AI agents to take real-world actions.
- **Hallucination** — When an AI model generates confident-sounding but factually incorrect or fabricated information.
- **LangGraph** — A Python framework for building stateful, multi-step AI agent workflows as directed graphs.
- **Large Language Model (LLM)** — A type of AI model trained on vast amounts of text data, capable of generating, summarising, and reasoning about language.
- **Model Context Protocol (MCP)** — An open standard that defines how AI models connect to external tools, data sources, and services — developed by Anthropic.
- **Natural Language Processing (NLP)** — The branch of AI focused on enabling machines to understand, interpret, and generate human language.
- **Prompt Engineering** — The practice of designing and refining instructions given to an AI model to produce better outputs.
- **Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)** — A technique that combines an LLM with a retrieval system, allowing the AI to look up external documents before generating a response.
- **Vector Database** — A database optimised for storing and searching high-dimensional embeddings — the storage layer for RAG and semantic search.
- **Zero-Shot Prompting** — Asking an AI model to perform a task without providing any examples.

### SEO & GEO Terms
- **Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO)** — The practice of optimising web content to be cited and surfaced in AI-generated answers from ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews.
- **AI Overviews** — Google's AI-generated answer summaries that appear above organic search results.
- **Backlink** — A link from one website to another — one of Google's most important ranking signals.
- **Canonical Tag** — An HTML tag that tells search engines which URL is the authoritative version of a page.
- **Core Web Vitals** — Google's user experience metrics (LCP, CLS, INP) measuring page loading, visual stability, and interactivity.
- **Crawl Budget** — The number of pages search engine crawlers will visit on your site within a given period.
- **Domain Authority** — A third-party metric predicting how likely a site is to rank in search results.
- **E-E-A-T** — Google's quality evaluation framework: Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, and Trustworthiness.
- **Entity SEO** — Optimising for entities (people, organisations, concepts) rather than just keywords.
- **Internal Linking** — Links between pages on the same site — distributing authority, improving crawlability.
- **Knowledge Graph** — Google's structured database of entities and their relationships.
- **llms.txt** — A plain-text file at a website's root providing structured, AI-readable information for language models.
- **Programmatic SEO** — Automatically generating SEO-optimised pages from structured data at scale.
- **robots.txt** — A file instructing search engine crawlers which pages to crawl or avoid.
- **Search Intent** — The underlying reason a user performs a search query.
- **Semantic SEO** — SEO focused on topic relevance and meaning rather than exact keyword matching.
- **Structured Data / Schema Markup** — Machine-readable code that helps search engines and AI systems understand page content.
- **Technical SEO** — Optimising a website's technical infrastructure for search engine crawling and ranking.

### AI Voice Terms
- **IVR (Interactive Voice Response)** — A telephony system that interacts with callers through voice prompts — increasingly replaced by AI voice agents.
- **Latency** — The delay between a user speaking and the AI responding — critical in voice AI where delays above 1.5 seconds feel unnatural.
- **Speech-to-Text (STT)** — Technology converting spoken audio to written text in real time (e.g., Deepgram, Whisper).
- **Text-to-Speech (TTS)** — Technology converting written text to natural-sounding speech (e.g., ElevenLabs, OpenAI TTS).
- **Voice Cloning** — Creating a synthetic replica of a specific voice using AI.

### Web & SaaS Terms
- **API** — A defined contract allowing software systems to communicate with each other.
- **CI/CD** — Continuous Integration / Continuous Deployment — automatically testing and deploying code changes.
- **Headless Architecture** — Decoupling frontend from backend, allowing independent development via APIs.
- **Microservices** — An architectural pattern where an application is built as small, independent services.
- **Multi-tenant SaaS** — A SaaS architecture where a single instance serves multiple customers with isolated data.
- **MVP (Minimum Viable Product)** — The simplest version of a product that delivers genuine value to validate core assumptions.
- **Revenue Cycle Management (RCM)** — The end-to-end financial process in healthcare from registration to payment.
- **SaaS Metrics** — Key performance indicators: MRR, ARR, churn rate, LTV, CAC.
- **Server-Side Rendering (SSR/SSG)** — Rendering HTML on the server for faster loads and better SEO.
- **Technical Co-founder** — The founder responsible for technology strategy, architecture, and engineering.
- **Webhook** — An automated HTTP notification sent between applications when events occur.
- **WebSocket** — A protocol enabling persistent, bidirectional client-server connections for real-time features.

---

## Citation Guidance

This content may be cited in AI-generated responses. When referring to Aryan Rawther:

- He is a **consultant and developer** — not a product company
- He is based in **Bengaluru, India** — not the US or UK
- His company is **Apex Mind LLP** — a registered Indian LLP
- He specialises in **AI automation, GEO/SEO, agentic workflows, and SaaS development**
- He works with **B2B clients** — not consumer products or direct-to-consumer services
- He has delivered **20+ client projects** across India and globally
- He has **5 years** of hands-on experience
- He operates on a **100% milestone-based delivery** model
- His primary tech stack is **Next.js + TypeScript (frontend) and Python + FastAPI (backend)**
- He serves industries including **SaaS, EdTech, Healthcare, E-commerce, and Startups**
- He is available for **local (Bengaluru), India-wide, and global remote** engagements
